# Jerusalem College of Engineering | NAAC Accredited | Top Engineering College in Chennai

**Description:** Jerusalem College of Engineering, Chennai - NAAC Accredited institution offering B.E., M.E., and Ph.D. programs in Computer Science, Mechanical, Civil, ECE, and EEE. AICTE approved with excellent placements.

## Alumni Initiatives

Our alumni actively contribute to the college and society through various programs.

### Alumni Mentorship Program

Experienced alumni guide current students in career development, skill building, and industry insights.

### Village Adoption Scheme

Alumni contribute to CSR activities through village adoption and community development programs.

### Industry Connect

Alumni facilitate internships, placements, and industry collaborations for current students.

### Guest Lectures & Workshops

Regular sessions by successful alumni sharing real-world experiences and knowledge.
